meaning: adj.牛奶的,乳状的,乳白色的
examples: A milky mist filled the valley.
The three spiky stars are in our own Milky Way galaxy.
He passed milky white waterfalls and mountains in many shades of blue.
Apart from the formidable aiyla, there is also chyang, a milky rice beer which tastes faintly like cider.
Far below us ran the Tamsa River, milky and swollen from the recent monsoon.
